programme.desc: Reno (Alzi Markers) and Dafa (Dimas Putra) are upset by the presence of Wina (Nabila Zavira), a new lecturer at their college. Wina is assigned to change Reno and Dafa's behavior so that they can achieve good grades.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta - EP 587
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 81
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: ROMEO, JULIET & SI NENEK
programme.desc: Midun, who was in the midst of a passionate romance with Mira, was extremely annoyed with Mira's grandmother, who constantly criticized him, saying he was reckless, had no future, and was rude, to the point of interfering in his relationship with Mira.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 133
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Lu Bijak Sama Gua Sekarang Neng Basreng
programme.desc: The tight schedule of being a famous artist made Tama exhausted while driving so Tama crashed into a basreng vendor. With her kindness even though she was upset Aina (Shanice Margaretha) took Tama (Lavicky Nicholas) to the hospital. After realizing, Tama was surprised why he was in the hospital with an unknown woman. Tama asked Aina not to publicize this case. Suddenly reporters came and asked who Aina was, Tama spontaneously claimed that Aina was his girlfriend.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 133
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: 4x4=16, Aku Bilang Cinta Hayo Dibalas
programme.desc: Mei (Jennifer Eve) in her daily life works as an assistant director, she must accompany a director to hunt for filming locations. Then at that time, Mei was upset, because her love was unrequited, namely because the guy she loved was going to marry another girl.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta - EP 587
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: Hatiku Ganjil Jika Tidak Genap Mencintaimu
programme.desc: Della (Rayna Snova) is constantly urged by her mother to get married, but she is not ready to open her heart after breaking up with Bram (Kevin Hillers). Bram still loves Della, yet Della starts dating Mario, Bram’s coworker who works as a bakery chef. Will Della and Bram reunite?

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 82
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: PLAYBOY OMDO, FINDING THE LOVE
programme.desc: Tomi, who acted arbitrarily as Dara's boss, got what he deserved. Dara asked her friend, Hilda, to subdue Tomi so that he would not act arbitrarily towards her. Will Tomi succumb to Dara's plan?

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 134

programme.title: Mba Siomay Cantiknya Natural Tanpa Naturalisasi
programme.desc: Elisa Mayasari (Ersya Aurelia) was fired from her job because of pinjol, which continues to haunt her. Elisa's sister Oki borrows money from pinjol until Robin (Andrew Andika), a Dept Collector, is sent to Elisa's office to collect her brother's debt.

programme.title: MENJARING CINTA DI TAMBAK NILA
programme.desc: Since becoming poor, Nila (Yuniza Icha) lives with her grandfather and manages his fish farm. Reza (Naufal Samudra), a regular customer at Nila’s fish pond, is upset because she no longer wants to sell him her fish. However, Reza keeps trying to persuade her since they both need the money.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 135
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Tolong Naikin Gaji Asisten Pembantu Cintanya
programme.desc: It is told that Santi It wants to work anything, as long as it is halal, to be able to meet the needs of his family. Where initially Santi's life was ordinary, until one day suddenly Santi received services as a versatile person. Santi gets a job to help Raza (Fendy Chow) get back with his ex.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta - EP 589
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. programme.title: Tikus dan Kucing - EP 5
programme.desc: Menceritakan kisah cinta Mitha dan Jaenal yang tidak mendapat restu ibu bapa masing-masing, kerana ibu bapa mereka sering bertengkar, dan saling membenci.

programme.title: Opocot Melatah Budak Pejabat S2 - EP 8
programme.desc: Dihoskan oleh Dato' AC Mizal, rancangan latah paling kecoh kini kembali dengan musim terbaru. Saksikan kaki latah popular seperti PS Mansur, Eida Moin & Nazia Mustafar menggeletek anda seisi keluarga.

programme.title: JOZAN - EP 17
programme.desc: Duo pelawak paling popular kini kembali setelah 7 tahun tidak bersama menghiburkan peminat menerusi program bual bicara terbaru yang pasti menghiburkan anda.

programme.title: Punchline - EP 5
programme.desc: Lebih meriah, lebih kecoh! Saksikan program variasi terbaharu yang menampilkan Dato' AC Mizal beraksi bersama PS Mansur dan tetamu jemputan yang bakal membuat anda tidak kering gusi!

programme.title: Kiah The Spy - EP 8
programme.desc: Kiah membina kumpulan baru untuk menguruskan perniagaan Ikan Pekasamnya,dia juga dilatih dan dilantik menjadi seorang ejen rahsia.

programme.title: NoYa - EP 4
programme.desc: Noya berhasrat untuk membawa semua kegilaan dan gelak ketawa yang telah diukir oleh Aya dan Noreen ke peringkat seterusnya.

programme.title: Bujang 40 - EP 9
programme.desc: Bujang, 40 tahun, sepanjang hidupnya sudah beberapa kali dia gagal bercinta. Kegagalan ini antara lain disebabkan sikap ibunya yang terlalu mengongkong hidupnya. Ini membuatkan Bujang mengambil keputusan untuk terus membujang.

programme.title: Sepahtu Reunion Live 2023 - EP 1
programme.desc: Berhibur bersama geng Sepahtu.

programme.title: Skrin Komedia: Tuyul Ke London - EP 15
programme.desc: Drama komedi tentang sepasang pencuri bertindak menggunakan seekor tuyul untuk mengembangkan jenayah mereka tapi perancangan mereka membawa mereka bertembung dengan pelbagai hantu yang tak disangka.

programme.title: Pulau Ke Pulau - EP 10
programme.desc: Sebuah rancangan untuk tontonan semua.

programme.title: Tabung Gelak Warna - EP 2
programme.desc: Rancangan menarik untuk tontonan anda semua.

programme.title: Muka Buku - EP 6
programme.desc: Muka Buku ialah rancangan permainan teka-teki, di mana selebriti perlu meneka antara empat peserta, siapa yang palsu dan siapa yang Muka Buku Sebenar.

programme.title: Sepahtu Reunion Live 2025 - EP 3
programme.desc: Program menarik bersama Sepahtu untuk tontonan semua.

programme.title: Kennot Brain 2021 - EP 1
programme.desc: Saksikan Alif Farhan & Ain Edruce bersama tetamu jemputan mereka yang pasti kecoh sambil merungkai video-video pelik yang 'trending' pada minggu ini.

programme.title: Sepahtu - EP 13
programme.desc: Sebuah rancangan komedia untuk tontonan semua.

programme.title: JOZAN - EP 18
programme.desc: Duo pelawak paling popular kini kembali setelah 7 tahun tidak bersama menghiburkan peminat menerusi program bual bicara terbaru yang pasti menghiburkan anda.

programme.title: Dendam 5 Beradik - EP 2
programme.desc: Pakatan 5 beradik berjaya memberkas Jimmy dan pengikutnya. Jimmy dijatuhkan hukuman mati mandatori atas perlakuan jenayahnya.

programme.title: Perempuan Paling Bahagia - EP 24
programme.desc: Rafa tidak dibenarkan berkahwin dan hanya perlu fokus pada kerja. Arissa telah meminta izin untuk menumpang bermalam di masjid.

programme.title: Motif Sosial? - EP 26
programme.desc: Kesinambungan Motif Viral, kali ini melalui eksperimen sosial yang viral dengan penampilan selebriti undangan.

programme.title: Opocot Melatah Budak Pejabat S2 - EP 9
programme.desc: Dihoskan oleh Dato' AC Mizal, rancangan latah paling kecoh kini kembali dengan musim terbaru. Saksikan kaki latah popular seperti PS Mansur, Eida Moin & Nazia Mustafar menggeletek anda seisi keluarga.

programme.title: Sketso S2 - EP 2
programme.desc: Rancangan menarik untuk tontonan seisi keluarga.

programme.title: Konnichiwa Superlawak - EP 1
programme.desc: Saksikan Jep, Rahim, Pak Ya, Tomok, dan rakan-rakan bola sepak Superlawak FC menjelajah ke Jepun demi menyahut cabaran perlawanan persahabatan menentang pasukan tempatan di bumi Jepun!

programme.title: Maharaja Lawak Mega 2019 - EP 5
programme.desc: Maharaja Lawak Mega kembali dengan penyertaan para pelawak terbaik di rantau ini merangkumi tiga negara Malaysia, Singapura dan Indonesia.

programme.title: Bas Ria - EP 2
programme.desc: Bas Ria bakal menyaksikan pasukan Bas Ria "memburu" selebriti-selebriti di dalam "hit list" mereka? Untuk apa? Untuk mendapatkan sesuatu yang berharga dari mereka.

programme.title: Kalau Berani Kampung Stail - EP 10
programme.desc: Setiap minggu Sherry dan ketua kumpulan akan di bawa ke kampung yang berlainan bersama artis jemputan untuk menolong ketua kumpulan memenangi perlawanan mingguan

programme.title: Karoot Komedia X S3 - EP 11
programme.desc: Sebuah rancangan komedi muzikal yang menggabungkan muzik, lakonan dan sketsa dengan topik-topik menarik secara spontan.

programme.title: Sorry, Sengaja! - EP 10
programme.desc: Rancangan "prank" yang berlaku di pejabat Astro, melibatkan pekerja-pekerja yang selalunya tidak menjangka akan sesuatu berlaku. Rancangan ini dikepalai oleh beberapa "prankster" dari Thinker Studios.

programme.title: Prankap Show - EP 2
programme.desc: Saksikan selebriti popular merancang "prank" bersama geng mereka dan mengenakan mangsa terpilih. Berjayakan perancangan "prank" mereka? Sama-sama kita nantikan!

programme.title: Spontan Boboi & Kengkawan - EP 13
programme.desc: Sebuah rancangan Spontan kanak-kanak yang di hoskan oleh Dato' Afdlin Shauki bersama artist and pelawak jemputan

programme.title: Sepahtu Renew - EP 1
programme.desc: Sitkom lucu tentang pemilik gerai makanan, pengusaha pusat cuci kereta, jururawat nakal, dan doktor sering terjerumus dalam situasi lucu yang menyentuh isu semasa dan bintang jemputan istimewa.

programme.title: Komedi Unplugged - EP 9
programme.desc: Bual bicara berbentuk komedi membariskan artis-artis jemputan daripada kalangan pelawak, selebriti, dan juga influencer untuk berkongsi cerita dan rasa.

programme.title: Sembang Pacak - EP 9

programme.title: Kakuda
programme.desc: Haunted by a village curse predicting her husband's death in thirteen days, a newlywed bride seeks a ghost hunter's help to save the man she loves desperately tonight. Release Year: 2024 Director: Aditya Sarpotdar

programme.title: Dabangg 2
programme.desc: Chulbul Pandey, a fearless yet reckless cop, angers a corrupt politician by killing his brother, leading to brutal revenge that drives him into a fight for justice. Release Year: 2012 Director: Arbaaz Khan Awards: 2013 Winner Popular Award for Best Actor - Salman Khan

programme.title: Qarib Qarib Singlle
programme.desc: Opposites Yogi and Jaya meet through a dating app, reliving past romances on a quirky journey that brings laughter, self-discovery, and a surprising chance to find real love. Release Year: 2017 Director: Tanuja Chandra Awards: 2018 Winner Popular AwardBest Female DebutParvathy Thiruvothu

programme.title: Rascals
programme.desc: Expert conmen Chetan and Bhagat fall for Khushi, but when an old victim Anthony kidnaps her, they must outwit danger and prove their love before it's too late. Release Year: 2011 Director: David Dhawan

programme.title: Diya
programme.desc: Forced into abortion, Thulasi's pain turns supernatural when the vengeful spirit of her unborn child returns years later, punishing those who destroyed her innocent future.

programme.title: Buddha In Traffic Jam
programme.desc: Carefree student Vikram's viral social campaign exposes harsh realities, but he soon gets trapped in a dangerous conspiracy of lies and deceit that threatens his life.

programme.title: Angaaray
programme.desc: After Sanjay dies trying to punish Jolly for Aarti's assault, she rises to seek justice herself, driven by grief, courage, and the need to avenge her brother. Release Year: 1986 Director: Rajesh Seth, Rajesh Sethi

programme.title: Khiladi 420
programme.desc: Ritu marries Dev Kumar, but after her father's death, her growing suspicion reveals Dev's hidden darkness, turning love into fear as disturbing truths surface. Release Year: 2000 Director: Neeraj Vora Awards: 3 nominations

programme.title: No Entry
programme.desc: A loyal friend helps a victim escape a cruel marriage by introducing her to a dancer, setting off a chain of comic misunderstandings, emotional twists, and surprising revelations. Release Year: 2005 Director: Anees Bazmee Awards: 2006 Nominee Filmfare Award Best Film

programme.title: Ghayal
programme.desc: Framed for his brother's murder by Balwant Rai, Ajay survives prison with three allies, planning a daring revenge that will expose the truth and bring down the powerful villain. Release Year: 1990 Director: Rajkumar Santoshi Awards: Best Film: Dharamendra, Best Actor: Sunny Deol, Best Director: Rajkumar Santoshi, Best Story Writer: Rajkumar Santoshi, Best Editor Filmfare Awards

programme.title: Buddha In Traffic Jam
programme.desc: Carefree student Vikram's viral social campaign exposes harsh realities, but he soon gets trapped in a dangerous conspiracy of lies and deceit that threatens his life.

programme.title: Angaaray
programme.desc: After Sanjay dies trying to punish Jolly for Aarti's assault, she rises to seek justice herself, driven by grief, courage, and the need to avenge her brother. Release Year: 1986 Director: Rajesh Seth, Rajesh Sethi

programme.title: Khiladi 420
programme.desc: Ritu marries Dev Kumar, but after her father's death, her growing suspicion reveals Dev's hidden darkness, turning love into fear as disturbing truths surface. Release Year: 2000 Director: Neeraj Vora Awards: 3 nominations

programme.title: F.A.L.T.U.
programme.desc: Four struggling friends fake a university to escape failure, but their risky lie grows out of control, forcing them to rely on friendship and quick thinking to survive the chaos.

programme.title: Aparichit - The Stranger
programme.desc: Timid Ambi who suffers from multiple personality disorder becomes Aparichit who does not think twice about killing wrong-doers.

programme.title: Gaami
programme.desc: Shankar isolates himself to cure a rare condition, but his journey forces him to confront buried fears and emotional wounds that hold the true key to his survival.

programme.title: Diya
programme.desc: Forced into abortion, Thulasi's pain turns supernatural when the vengeful spirit of her unborn child returns years later, punishing those who destroyed her innocent future.

programme.title: Mere Husband Ki Biwi
programme.desc: A divorced man's life turns chaotic when his college crush returns just as his amnesiac ex-wife reappears, sparking a hilarious love triangle full of confusion

programme.title: Nela Ticket
programme.desc: Nela Ticket, an orphan, is raised by Ananda Bhoopati, who is later killed by his own son, Aditya. However, things turn ugly after Nela Ticket and Aditya come face-to-face.

programme.title: Gharaonda
programme.desc: Sudip and Chaya decide to get married to each other. They buy a house with much difficulty but are left aghast when the builder, who is a fraud, runs away with their money.

programme.title: Extraa Shots - Befikre
programme.desc: Watch behind the scenes and meet the cast and crew of the movie.

programme.title: Sardar Ka Grandson
programme.desc: A devoted grandson embarks on a complicated and comic journey to fulfill his ailing grandmother's last wish.

programme.title: Mister Mummy
programme.desc: A grumpy teacher and his kind wife clash on the subject of children, but a rare twist of fate leads them to connect in ways they never thought possible.

programme.title: Sadak
programme.desc: A young man who falls in love with a sex worker must overcome the social stigma as well as face the brothel owner and some criminal elements.

programme.title: Afwaah
programme.desc: A woman seeks to escape her engagement to a violent politician, but when a stranger comes to her aid, the two face an onslaught of bigotry and hate.

programme.title: Manjummel Boys
programme.desc: A carefree adventure turns perilous when one friend falls into Guna Caves, triggering a gripping test of unity and survival against impossible odds.

programme.title: Adbhut
programme.desc: Follows Diana who doesn't believe in supernatural power. But when she feels something strange happening on a regular basis, she reaches out to Nawaz for help.

programme.title: Gulabo Sitabo
programme.desc: Two scheming men get caught up in a game of one-up-manship, each one attracting other members to their clan and each one with an agenda of his own.

programme.title: Haseen Dillruba
programme.desc: Under investigation as a suspect in her husband's murder, a wife reveals details of their thorny marriage that seem to only further blur the truth.

programme.title: Ramji Londonwale
programme.desc: This is the story about Ramji, who is a skilled cook and flies to London to try his luck in work. It is the story about his journey and life in London.

programme.title: Ek Villain Returns
programme.desc: When a singer disappears during a serial killer spree, a taxidriver and a businessman's son cross paths in a disturbing tale where the lines between good and evil are blurred.

programme.title: Majhdhaar
programme.desc: Krishna loves Radha but they cannot marry against their parent's wishes. Although she is pregnant with Krishna's child, circumstances lead Radha to marry Gopal.

programme.title: Anari
programme.desc: A rich girl appoints a simpleton, as her bodyguard. She soon falls in love with him, which creates havoc in his life.

programme.title: Dashing Hero
programme.desc: A revenue inspector falls in love with a girl but faces problems due to his cowardliness. He is compelled to find a way to prove himself to her father, who wants her to marry a brave man.

programme.title: Ab Tak Chhappan 2
programme.desc: Sadhu Agashe, a retired encounter specialist, faces a series of challenges after he returns to Mumbai to solve various criminal cases growing in the city.

programme.title: Paagalpanti
programme.desc: A tourist group from India sets out on a vacation to only have their trip to turn into a patriotic mission. Will it end well for them?

programme.title: Bewakoofiyaan
programme.desc: Mohit a marketing whiz kid and Mayera, the financial brain with a penchant for shoes, are a couple in love but lacking money. Can you survive on just love and fresh air?

programme.title: Saala Khadoos
programme.desc: The story of a former boxer who quits boxing following a fallout with the authorities but goes on to coach a fisherwoman to fulfill his dream through her. Starring Madhavan.

programme.title: Toolsidas Junior
programme.desc: Watching his father lose the 1994 Club Snooker Championship, 13-year-old Midi takes on the impossible journey to bring his father's name on the Winner's Board.

programme.title: Costao
programme.desc: In the 1990s, customs officer Costao Fernandes becomes a legend in Goa due to his bravery and tactics. His personal and professional life unravels when he kills a powerful drug lord in self-defence.

programme.title: Srikanth
programme.desc: In a world where the odds are against him, Srikanth defies the norms and makes his way from rural India to becoming the first visually impaired student at MIT.

programme.title: Style
programme.desc: Four college friends try to help two lovers get married against the wishes of their parents. The attempts of the youngsters lead to hilarious consequences.

programme.title: Punitha
programme.desc: Maragatham holds her step-daughter Punitha dear, to the point of being overbearing. However, their bond turns twisted & burdened when Punitha finds her soulmate, Kabilan. Amidst family betrayals, can Punitha show her mother the true meaning of love?

programme.title: MANAMAGALE VAA
programme.desc: Narmada's mission to her ancestral village to reunite her father & his estranged family entwines with Kathir's task of finding suitable grooms for his three sisters. What unfolds when they fall in love, striving for a cause against the same enemy?

programme.desc: Maha, her family’s financial backbone, marries Selvam, on condition that she will continue to support her family financially even after marriage. Post which they confront challenges that put the family’s peace and happiness to test.

programme.title: IRU MALARGAL
programme.desc: When secrets, societal pressure, and an unexpected wedding come between three childhood friends-Aadhi, Magizhini, and Madhiyazhagi-tradition and emotions clash, turning their lives upside down and testing every bond they hold dear.

programme.title: AADUKALAM
programme.desc: Sathya loves her sister like a second mother & believes compassion outweighs all riches. But, Selvanayagi, a woman of pride & privilege, worships money & social status. When their worlds collide, what trials will Sathya face in her fight for justice?

programme.title: Movie- CHERAN PANDIAN

programme.desc: The life of a simple flower farm girl is shattered when she falls for a charming accountant, who turns out to be a married gun cartel member. Targeted for his stolen money, she loses everything she holds dear and reinvents herself to seek justice.

programme.title: The Alibi
programme.desc: Vincent is accused of killing his rival, Walter. To protect his reputation, he hires Stella, an escort with her own haunted past, to pose as his alibi. What begins as a transactional arrangement soon becomes dangerously real.

programme.title: What Lies Beneath
programme.desc: The lives of four individuals are turned upside down after they witness the murder of their friend. They band together to put the alleged killer behind bars, but years later, the imprisoned man seeks revenge, unraveling dark secrets that test their loyalty and survival.

programme.title: The Secrets of Hotel 88
programme.desc: The Secrets of Hotel 88 dives into a gripping story of the estranged Fernandez brothers - Martin, Gio and Kiko - who unexpectedly inherit Hotel 88 following their father's death. Driven by conflicting motives, the three find themselves locked in escalating tension and a brewing family feud.

programme.desc: With a degree in history and civilisation, Charles-Olivier is struggling to find a job in his field. He eventually takes a job as a clerk in a swimming pool shop. With his spirits low, he's getting by as best he can.

programme.title: Marianne - EP 5
programme.desc: The remains of a train driver have been found on a railway line. All the clues point to him having been knocked unconscious then placed on the rails whilst waiting for a train to pass. Investigating the case, Marianne finds each new detail more disturbing than the last.

programme.title: Temps Present

programme.desc: The television news programme of the France 2 editorial board (1 p.m. edition, Paris time).

programme.title: Parler Mal
programme.desc: Could it be that two Acadian actors in the successful series ''a la valdrague'' suffer from linguistic insecurity? Bianca Richard and Gabriel Robichaud, from New Brunswick, set themselves the challenge of deciphering this curse and examine the state of expression of the French-Canadian language and particularly Acadian.

programme.title: Le Mot Je T'aime N'existe Pas
programme.desc: In the shadow of the Republic and the tumult of different dialects, Nadesh, Cherif and Anamiga are amongst the countless interpreters working daily to recount stories of exile and precarity. Their voices weave an invisible thread between here and elsewhere, the world of the living and the darkness of migration.

programme.title: Echappees Belles
programme.desc: Sophie Jovillard, Jerome Pitorin, Ismael Khelifa and Tiga embark the traveller that lies within each of us for a fabulous breath of fresh air! Ninety minutes filled with new horizons and fascinating encounters around the world, four different ways of seeing a city, a region, a country...

programme.title: DW News
programme.desc: Stay tuned as Deutsche Welle (DW), Germany's international broadcaster presents the country’s news, current affairs and showcases its people's life and mentality.

programme.title: DocFilm
programme.desc: Sabine, Clais and Orm were children when their fathers were murdered. The killings, carried out by the far-left German terrorist group the Rote Armee Fraktion ("Red Army Faction"), or RAF, brought an abrupt, violent end to their childhoods. In this film, they share how terrorism changed their lives forever.

programme.title: DW News
programme.desc: Stay tuned as Deutsche Welle (DW), Germany's international broadcaster presents the country’s news, current affairs and showcases its people's life and mentality.

programme.title: The Dip
programme.desc: Germany was once known as an industrial powerhouse in Europe, but key sectors, including auto manufacturing, have been struggling for years. Now, new figures show a dismal beginning to the year. We look at how 2026 could be a make-or-break moment for German carmakers and the critical industrial sector.

programme.title: Arts Unveiled
programme.desc: Was philosopher Friedrich Nietzsche the first influencer? Also: Photographer Benyamin Reich's quest for identity, singer-songwriter Tyler Ballgame's debut album and art at Burg Ranfels.

programme.title: DW News

programme.title: Close up

programme.title: Movie - Arasu
programme.desc: Thirunavukkarasu, a gentle soul, takes up the job of handling the temple accounts in Agraharam. Soon, he shows his true identity and seeks revenge against a dangerous criminal who is out of jail.

programme.title: Movie - February 14
programme.desc: Shiva falls in love with Pooja, a girl raised in the US, who is in India visiting her grandparents. When she wants to return to the US, he creates a fictitious character to impress her.

programme.title: Movie - Mary Albert
programme.desc: Albert returns home from the city after a long time of separation from his family. When his brother is killed by a corrupt politician, Albert sets out to seek his revenge.

programme.title: Movie - Sirayile Sila Ragangal
programme.desc: This movie stars Murali, Pallavi and Prathap K Pothen, and is directed by Rajendrakumar.

programme.title: Fillers
programme.desc: KTV HD presents you round-the-clock Kollywood movies, from the latest blockbusters to classics of the yesteryear!

programme.title: Movie - Kannamoochi Enada
programme.desc: Harish, a software engineer in Singapore, falls in love with Swathi. However, her father, a police commissioner, instantly rejects Harish after learning a few disturbing facts about him.

programme.title: Movie - Manitharil Ithanai Nirangala
programme.desc: Santha finds herself in a dilemma when a man named Mohan, whose father is a police officer she recognises from her past, falls in love with her.

programme.title: Movie - Raja Pandi
programme.desc: To save his mother from a death sentence, Pandi kidnaps daughters of some high-profile people in society and demands his mother's release. He claims that she has been wrongly framed.

programme.title: Movie - Chinna Vathiyar
programme.desc: A scientist gets into trouble when he develops a formula that enables the soul to move out of a body and enter the person or animal present in close proximity.

programme.title: Movie - Pulikuthi Pandi
programme.desc: A young man named Pulikkuthi Pandi fights injustice while trying to pursue a beautiful woman. However, problems arise when he locks horns with a powerful individual.

programme.title: Movie - Bala
programme.desc: Bala, a hitman in Pasupathi's gang, is madly in love with Aarthi, the daughter of a rival gangster. Bala faces several problems when both the gangs plan to end their rivalry.

programme.title: Movie - Thamizhachi
programme.desc: After her husband is unjustly imprisoned on false charges, a woman refuses to step out of her house. With the arrival of a female reporter looking for real stories, the truth eventually comes out.

programme.title: Movie - Bramachari
programme.desc: Ganesan and Malathi fall in love despite being from different economic backgrounds. However, Malathi's father Thiruvadi stands as an obstacle to their marriage.

programme.title: Fillers
programme.desc: KTV HD presents you round-the-clock Kollywood movies, from the latest blockbusters to classics of the yesteryear!

programme.title: Movie - Hello
programme.desc: Chandru's friends make fun of him as he does not have a girlfriend. He points out a girl claiming that she is his girlfriend, after which various unfortunate events take place in her life.

programme.title: Movie - Azhagesan
programme.desc: Azhagesan, a mentally-challenged man, secretly loves Nandini. However when Sekhar, an evil man, rapes Nandini, Azhagesan sets out to take revenge.

programme.title: Movie - Sabash
programme.desc: Cheenu, a blind man, and his friend Dharan discover the body of Cheenu's wife Shanti. Initially, the police regard it as a suicide. However, evidence soon surfaces suggesting foul play.

programme.title: Movie - Salangai Oli
programme.desc: Balakrishna, a trained Kuchipudi dancer, gets an opportunity to compete in a classical dance festival. However, two days prior to his performance, his mother passes away, leaving him devastated.

programme.title: Movie - Kadhal Sugamanathu
programme.desc: A woman loves a man but does not have the courage to confess her feelings. Instead, she asks her younger sister to approach her love interest. However her sister betrays her by proposing to him herself.

programme.title: ATP Tour 2026 BCI Seguros Chile Open (250) Final
programme.desc: The Chile Open is a professional ATP Tour 250 men’s tennis tournament played on outdoor red clay courts in Santiago, Chile. As part of the prestigious "Golden Swing" of Latin American tournaments, it is a key event in the early season. It has roots back to 1930 and is played at the Club Deportivo Universidad Católica in Santiago.

programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW - EP 29
programme.desc: Michael Kayode's journey to the Premier League has been anything but straightforward. After spending seven years in the Juventus academy, Kayode moved to Gozzano in Serie D. A breakout campaign saw the then 16-year-old play a big part in Gozzano's title win and promotion. His form soon caught the attention of Fiorentina, where he made his Serie A debut and played in back-to-back UEFA Conference League finals.

programme.title: PREMIER LEAGUE LIVE (Live)

programme.title: EXTRA TIME - MON 16 MAR (Live)
programme.desc: A look at a Premier League season through the eyes of a player who excelled that particular year. The highs and lows and everything in between, that made it a memorable and at times defining nine months for both the player and his club.

programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW - EP 31
programme.desc: This week, The Big Interview sits down with Newcastle United's Malick Thiaw to discuss his journey to the Premier League. Growing up in Dusseldorf within a multicultural family, the German International reflects on his early life and the role models that shaped him. Rising through the academy systems of various Bundesliga clubs, Thiaw made his mark at Schalke 04 before donning the famous Rossoneri shirt of AC Milan where he won the Supercoppa Italiana in 2025.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 41
programme.desc: We shine a spotlight on Unai Emery, tracing the journey of one of Europe's most meticulous and innovative coaches from his roots in Spain to the pinnacle of the Premier League. Through exclusive interviews with his brother and the coaches who guided him in his early years, we uncover the dedication, detail and relentless drive that shaped his rise in the game.

programme.desc: Highlights from the latest Premier League Matchweek. Review incorporates all the key moments and manager reaction from every fixture, making it a must-see programme for all Premier League fans.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 7
programme.desc: Arguably the greatest American goalkeeper of all time, Brad Friedel made an incredible 450 appearances in the Premier League playing for Tottenham, Aston Villa, Blackburn and Liverpool. programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 15
programme.desc: Edwin van der Sar has faced down pressure on the biggest stages in world football, but his toughest battle came after retirement. In 2023, the legendary goalkeeper suffered a life-threatening brain haemorrhage. In this episode Edwin opens up on his recovery and looks back on his career at the top that redefined goalkeeping.

programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW - EP 31
programme.desc: This week, The Big Interview sits down with Newcastle United's Malick Thiaw to discuss his journey to the Premier League. Growing up in Dusseldorf within a multicultural family, the German International reflects on his early life and the role models that shaped him. Rising through the academy systems of various Bundesliga clubs, Thiaw made his mark at Schalke 04 before donning the famous Rossoneri shirt of AC Milan where he won the Supercoppa Italiana in 2025.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 41
programme.desc: We shine a spotlight on Unai Emery, tracing the journey of one of Europe's most meticulous and innovative coaches from his roots in Spain to the pinnacle of the Premier League. Through exclusive interviews with his brother and the coaches who guided him in his early years, we uncover the dedication, detail and relentless drive that shaped his rise in the game.

programme.title: Nottingham Forest vs Fulham (MW30) - EP 298
programme.desc: Nottingham Forest have the lowest shot conversion rate of any side in the Premier League this season (7.5%). Indeed, the Tricky Trees rank in the top 10 for total shots (373), but only bottom side Wolves (22) have scored fewer goals (28).

programme.title: Crystal Palace vs Leeds United (MW30) - EP 293
programme.desc: Crystal Palace have underperformed their expected goals more than any other side in the Premier League this season (-12.1), netting just 33 goals from an xG of 45.1.

programme.title: Nottingham Forest vs Fulham (MW30) - EP 298
programme.desc: Nottingham Forest have the lowest shot conversion rate of any side in the Premier League this season (7.5%). Indeed, the Tricky Trees rank in the top 10 for total shots (373), but only bottom side Wolves (22) have scored fewer goals (28).

programme.title: Crystal Palace vs Leeds United (MW30) - EP 293
programme.desc: Crystal Palace have underperformed their expected goals more than any other side in the Premier League this season (-12.1), netting just 33 goals from an xG of 45.1.

programme.title: FS MMA Nick Agallar vs. Nardu Debrah
programme.desc: BodogFIGHT features classic MMA matches involving some of your favorite fighters! Two Americans will engage in a lightweight battle for the next roster spot as Nardu Debrah of Brooklyn, NY and Nick Agallar of Milwaukee, WI square off in Costa Rica.

programme.title: MEGA Fights In 60 Edison Miranda vs. Willie Gibbs
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features Super Middleweights Edison Miranda (26-2, 23 KOs) vs. Willie 'The Gladiator' Gibbs (20-1, 16 KOs) from the Miccosukee Indian Gaming Resort in Miami, Florida, USA. Bonus coverage includes Jason Litzau, aka 'The American Boy' (20-1, 18 KOs) vs. Jose Hernandez (21-3, 13 KOs).

programme.title: MEGA Fights In 60 Jermain Taylor vs. Jeff Lacy
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features former Middleweight Champion Jermain 'Bad Intentions' Taylor (27-2, 17 KOs) in a back and forth battle with Jeff "Left Hook' Lacy (24-1, 17 KOs) in a WBC Super Middleweight Title Eliminator on November 15, 2008 from the Vanderbilt University Memorial Gymnasium in Nashville, Tennessee, USA.

programme.title: Judo for the World
programme.desc: Judo for the World features the best competitors in the sport as they compete in a global tour for an opportunity to vie for the gold in the World Judo Championship. In this episode we see the best of the Judo Grand Slam from Ekaterinburg, speak with number 1 ranked fighter Khasan Khalmurzaev about his return to Judo, and show Soichi Hashimoto's success using his signature throw.

programme.title: XMA
programme.desc: In this episode we focus on the martial art of breaking and how the techniques are fine-tuned with technology.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Saul (Canelo) Alvarez vs. Jose Miguel Cotto
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is Saul (Canelo) Alvarez defending his NABF welterweight title against Jose Miguel Cotto, Alvarez's final bout before rising through the ranks and championships of the WBC. Also on the card, a heavyweight kickboxing clash between Errol Zimmerman vs. Rico Verhoeven.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo
programme.desc: For the first time the top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. This new format presents Sumo in an authentic, in-depth and entertaining way covering the rules, ranks, match-ups, and more. Show 1 featuring Goeido, Ichinojo, Daieisho and Kotoeko from the Aki basho, 2019.

programme.title: Wide World of Fights Sergio Martinez vs. Matthew Macklin
programme.desc: This episode features an undisputed middleweight title fight between Sergio Martinez and Matthew Macklin, as well as kickboxing, sumo and more!

programme.title: Prison Fighters
programme.desc: This series follows former Muay Thai champion Noy Khaopan and American Cody Moberly, two inmates in a Thailand prison, who after seven years are given the chance to fight for their release. By joining a controversial government modern day Prison Fight program, murderers and felons are given the chance to fight for their freedom, and possible redemption, through the ancient tradition of Muay Thai matches. Episode 3 of 4.

programme.title: FS MMA Nick Agallar vs. Nardu Debrah

programme.title: MEGA Fights In 60 Andre Berto vs. Miguel Rodriguez
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features undefeated Andre Berto (21-0, 18 KOs) battling Miguel Angel Rodriguez, aka 'Miki', (29-2, 23 KOs)i for the vacant WBC Welterweight Title from the FedEx Forum in Memphis, Tennessee, USA on June 21, 2008. Bonus coverage includes Chris 'The Nightmare' Arreola (23-0, 21 KOs) vs. Chazz Witherspoon (23-0, 15 KOs).

programme.title: Greatest Classics Vinny Pazienza vs. Gilbert Dele
programme.desc: In this episode, we see 'The Pazmanian Devil' Vinny Pazienza in front of his hometown crowd in Providence, Rhode Island, taking on undefeated WBA Super Welterweight World Champion Gilbert Dele of France. The raucous crowd was firmly in favor of its local hero, cheering him on as he looked to win his second World Title, having lost the first one to Greg Haugen three years earlier.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Chris Arreola vs. Tomasz Adamek
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is a heavyweight collision between Chris Arreola and Tomasz Adamek in a battle of one-loss competitors. Also on the card, Rocky Jearez takes on Jorge Barrios before a gruesome cut calls an end to the fight.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo
programme.desc: For the first time the top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. This new format presents Sumo in an authentic, in-depth and entertaining way covering the rules, ranks, match-ups, and more. Show 2 featuring Abi, Tamawashi, Takarafuji and Mitakeumi from the Aki basho, 2019.

programme.title: Wide World of Fights Bernard Hopkins vs. Jean Pascal
programme.desc: This episode features Bernard Hopkins taking on Jean Pascal in a light heavyweight title bout, as well as kickboxing, sumo and more!

programme.title: Prison Fighters
programme.desc: This series follows former Muay Thai champion Noy Khaopan and American Cody Moberly, two inmates in a Thailand prison, who after seven years are given the chance to fight for their release. By joining a controversial government modern day Prison Fight program, murderers and felons are given the chance to fight for their freedom, and possible redemption, through the ancient tradition of Muay Thai matches. Episode 4 of 4.

programme.title: FIGHT SPORTS MMA Themba Gorimbo vs. Luke Michael
programme.desc: This episode features Themba 'The Answer' Gorimbo and Luke 'Young Gun' Michael battling for the vacant welterweight championship. Vicious ground and pound ends this fight before the end of Round 1. Bonus coverage includes Sizwe Mnikathi vs. August Kayambala.

programme.desc: The main event in this episode is a heavyweight collision between Chris Arreola and Tomasz Adamek in a battle of one-loss competitors. Also on the card, Rocky Jearez takes on Jorge Barrios before a gruesome cut calls an end to the fight.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo
programme.desc: For the first time the top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. This new format presents Sumo in an authentic, in-depth and entertaining way covering the rules, ranks, match-ups, and more. Show 2 featuring Abi, Tamawashi, Takarafuji and Mitakeumi from the Aki basho, 2019.

programme.title: Wide World of Fights Bernard Hopkins vs. Jean Pascal
programme.desc: This episode features Bernard Hopkins taking on Jean Pascal in a light heavyweight title bout, as well as kickboxing, sumo and more!

programme.title: Prison Fighters
programme.desc: This series follows former Muay Thai champion Noy Khaopan and American Cody Moberly, two inmates in a Thailand prison, who after seven years are given the chance to fight for their release. By joining a controversial government modern day Prison Fight program, murderers and felons are given the chance to fight for their freedom, and possible redemption, through the ancient tradition of Muay Thai matches. Episode 4 of 4.

programme.title: FIGHT SPORTS MMA Themba Gorimbo vs. Luke Michael
programme.desc: This episode features Themba 'The Answer' Gorimbo and Luke 'Young Gun' Michael battling for the vacant welterweight championship. Vicious ground and pound ends this fight before the end of Round 1. Bonus coverage includes Sizwe Mnikathi vs. August Kayambala.

programme.title: MEGA Fights In 60 Andre Berto vs. Miguel Rodriguez
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features undefeated Andre Berto (21-0, 18 KOs) battling Miguel Angel Rodriguez, aka 'Miki', (29-2, 23 KOs)i for the vacant WBC Welterweight Title from the FedEx Forum in Memphis, Tennessee, USA on June 21, 2008. Bonus coverage includes Chris 'The Nightmare' Arreola (23-0, 21 KOs) vs. Chazz Witherspoon (23-0, 15 KOs).

programme.title: Greatest Classics Vinny Pazienza vs. Gilbert Dele
programme.desc: In this episode, we see 'The Pazmanian Devil' Vinny Pazienza in front of his hometown crowd in Providence, Rhode Island, taking on undefeated WBA Super Welterweight World Champion Gilbert Dele of France. The raucous crowd was firmly in favor of its local hero, cheering him on as he looked to win his second World Title, having lost the first one to Greg Haugen three years earlier.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Chris Arreola vs. Tomasz Adamek
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is a heavyweight collision between Chris Arreola and Tomasz Adamek in a battle of one-loss competitors. Also on the card, Rocky Jearez takes on Jorge Barrios before a gruesome cut calls an end to the fight.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo
programme.desc: For the first time the top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. Show 2 featuring Abi, Tamawashi, Takarafuji and Mitakeumi from the Aki basho, 2019.

programme.title: Wide World of Fights Bernard Hopkins vs. Jean Pascal
programme.desc: This episode features Bernard Hopkins taking on Jean Pascal in a light heavyweight title bout, as well as kickboxing, sumo and more!

programme.title: Prison Fighters
programme.desc: This series follows former Muay Thai champion Noy Khaopan and American Cody Moberly, two inmates in a Thailand prison, who after seven years are given the chance to fight for their release. By joining a controversial government modern day Prison Fight program, murderers and felons are given the chance to fight for their freedom, and possible redemption, through the ancient tradition of Muay Thai matches. programme.title: FIGHT SPORTS MMA Themba Gorimbo vs. Luke Michael
programme.desc: This episode features Themba 'The Answer' Gorimbo and Luke 'Young Gun' Michael battling for the vacant welterweight championship. Vicious ground and pound ends this fight before the end of Round 1. Bonus coverage includes Sizwe Mnikathi vs. August Kayambala.

programme.title: MEGA Fights Edwin Rodriguez vs. Jason Escalera
programme.desc: This episode features a USBA super middleweight title bout that sees Edwin Rodriguez defend against the undefeated Jason Escalera.

programme.title: Karate 1 Premier League
programme.desc: Dublin, Ireland welcomes one of the most anticipated events in Martial Arts this year as the Karate 1 Premier League returns. This will be the first Karate 1 Premier League event to take place in Dublin, with many of the top competitors in the world making the journey to Ireland for the first time and where the new Grand Winners will be crowned.

programme.title: Wide World of Fights Lamont Peterson vs. Amir Khan
programme.desc: Lamont Peterson takes on Amir Khan in a bout with a controversial ending, as well as kickboxing, sumo and more!

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Amir Khan vs. Marcos Maidana
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is Amir Khan defending the WBA light welterweight title against Marcos Maidana in a bout that earned 2010 Fight of the Year honors from the Boxing Writers Association of America. Also on the card, a young Adrien Broner showcases his skills.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo
programme.desc: For the first time the top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. This new format presents Sumo in an authentic, in-depth and entertaining way covering the rules, ranks, match-ups, and more. Show 3 featuring Okinoumi, Kotoyuki, Kotoshogiku and Endo from the Aki basho, 2019.

programme.title: Judo for the World
programme.desc: Judo for the World features the best competitors in the sport as they compete in a global tour for an opportunity to vie for the gold in the World Judo Championship. In this episode we see the best of the first ever Judo Grand Prix from Cancun, stop to get to know number 2 ranked fighter in the world Tal Flicker, and show a demonstration on how to execute one of Flicker's favorite submissions.

programme.title: MMA:30
programme.desc: This episode features a look at rising star Ryan "Darth" Bader. We go over BMX bike jumps with heavyweight Roy "Big Country" Nelson. And MMA:30 takes you inside the training camp of stud wrestler Phil Davis and we take a look at Bellator's duel promotional event Dynamite.

programme.title: Teletubbies (S1) - EP 61
programme.desc: The Teletubbies accidentally leave the Tiddlytubbies' gate open and some of them escape into Home Dome. The Teletubbies must find them all and then close the gate.

programme.title: Yakka Dee (S2) - EP 15
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say 'cloud' and we go on a whirlwind word adventure! We explore rain clouds, snow clouds, funny clouds and someone even dresses up as a cloud!

programme.title: Messy goes to OKIDO (S3) - EP 11
programme.desc: Messy wants to run further, but he keeps getting out of breath. Will he be able to take on the Great OKIDO Challenge and race to the finish line?

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops (S1) - EP 1
programme.desc: Mojo Swoptops and best buddy Bo love to help their friends in the little town of Swoppiton. With a swop of Mojo's top and Bo's brilliant plans, they make an unstoppable team!

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 19
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo make mud pizzas and deliver them to the grown-ups, but their pedal car's wheel keeps falling off.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 18
programme.desc: When a heavy summer rain thunders over the Heeler home, Bluey is determined to dam the water in the front yard, while Mum tries to stop her constantly tracking mud into the house.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5) - EP 6
programme.desc: Why do my feet hurt?', Tag asks Duggee. While Duggee has a think, he tells them 'why' is a great question, and the Squirrels are quick to follow up.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5) - EP 5
programme.desc: Duggee is encouraging the Squirrels to come outside by gesturing through the window. They don't understand what he's doing and think it's funny. When he comes inside, he explains that he was miming.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1) - EP 4
programme.desc: Billy and the Sillies introduce a visit to chicken A&E, the Squirrels build a bug house, Norrie has her chance to shine, and the Penguins give facts about what's hot and what's not.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1) - EP 5
programme.desc: King Tiger and the Jelly wonder what Duggee has planned for today. Tag wants a snack, Enid has a musical cheese chase, and Norrie has a haircut.

programme.title: Go Jetters (S2) - EP 49
programme.desc: It's the Go Jetters as you've never seen them before as they take part in a disco dazzling around the world gameshow!

programme.title: Bluey (S1) - EP 17
programme.desc: At school, Bluey and her friends enjoy various games. Teacher Calypso keeps her charges on track with a wise word and a song... all except the mysterious Pretzel.

programme.title: Bluey (S2) - EP 20
programme.desc: When Dad brings a pair of tenacious tickle crabs home from the beach, nowhere in the house is safe! His only hope of escaping their tickles is with help from his true love.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 31
programme.desc: When mum's sister Brandy comes over for a visit, she brings the kids onesies as a present, which has an unexpected effect on Bingo.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 32
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo hide under the house and spy on two mysterious tradies working in the backyard, wondering what they're up to.

programme.title: Andy's Aquatic Adventures (S1) - EP 5
programme.desc: Andy heads to the Galapagos Islands to see how sea lions deal with annoying flies.

programme.title: Playtime Towers (S1) - EP 1
programme.desc: Bella and Lift are visited by a shining star and set off to explore the floors of Playtime Towers. The first stop is Sketch in Boxtropolis - what will she be making today?

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S4) - EP 33
programme.desc: Whilst helping Duggee clean up, the Squirrels come across an old lamp. Duggee explains that many years ago, when rubbed, it could grant three magical wishes.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S4) - EP 32
programme.desc: The Squirrels learn about atoms, molecules and cells to help understand sizing when they try to sort a line-up of things from smallest to biggest.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S4) - EP 31
programme.desc: The Squirrels are getting ready for the same woodland adventure, but their mornings all look slightly different.

programme.title: Go Jetters (S2) - EP 3
programme.desc: Xuli and Glitch go head to head as they try to beat the Go Jet Academy land speed record.

programme.title: Go Jetters (S2) - EP 2
programme.desc: Glitch gets into a mountain of trouble as the Go Jetters attempt to climb the Matterhorn.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends (S24) - EP 11
programme.desc: Sonny returns to Sodor to try to be a really useful engine again but some of the other trains aren't willing to give him a second chance.

programme.title: Sarah and Duck (S3) - EP 30
programme.desc: Music Lady needs Sarah & Duck's help to return a music-loving stowaway back to the Cloud Tower.

programme.title: Sarah and Duck (S3) - EP 32
programme.desc: Sarah & Duck are excited to visit the observatory to see a passing comet.

programme.title: Stan Can (S1) - EP 5
programme.desc: Stanley must keep Myrtle's pumpkin safe from Speedy the snail. He builds a series of obstacles and defences to protect it from the tenacious Speedy who tests Stanley's ingenuity.

programme.title: Stan Can (S1) - EP 4
programme.desc: Stanley, Sophie and Benjamin make up a new game, 'Dino-Pirates'. This is such a good game, they use it as inspiration for Stanley's carnival float.

programme.title: Number 1 Newton Avenue (S1) - EP 4
programme.desc: A series exploring maths in everyday scenarios. With catchy songs and fun animation.

programme.title: JoJo & Gran Gran (S3) - EP 15
programme.desc: JoJo's excited to go on her first camping trip with Gran Gran, Cousin Lexi and Uncle Tyrell. It'll be JoJo's first time sleeping outside, and there's lots to find out about camping.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 14
programme.desc: For her Father's Day card, Bluey sets out to draw a picture of herself and her father together. While recalling her favourite memories of playing with Bandit, Bluey struggles with the idea that her drawing must be perfect. Chilli tries to convince Bluey that perfection isn't easy, or absolutely necessary.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 15
programme.desc: While waiting to be picked up from school, Jack plays at being a sailor trying to find his way back home to Australia. Meanwhile, Jack's Dad has got lost on route to collect him.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 16
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo want to play restaurants with Grandad, but it's a little different than he's used to... he's going to need an app to order the food!

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S2) - EP 20
programme.desc: The squirrels have arrived and they're all a little bit hyped up with bundles of energy. Things are starting to get a bit frantic, and Duggee needs to calm them all down. Fortunately, he has his Yoga Badge.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S2) - EP 19
programme.desc: Duggee has a package that needs delivering right at the other end of the river, and a long way from the clubhouse. It looks like the squirrels are going to have a day out on the boat. Good job Duggee has his River badge!

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1) - EP 11
programme.desc: How many siblings does Norrie have? What's Duggee's favourite badge? What does everyone do on Fridays? Squirrel Club has the answers!

programme.title: Go Jetters (S2) - EP 33
programme.desc: Glitch and the Grimbots are on holiday in Egypt where the Grimbots bury the Great Sphinx in sand, leaving only its head showing.

programme.title: Roots & Fruits (S1) - EP 9
programme.desc: Live from the Roots & Fruits theatre, it's Corn singing an A-maiz-ing Counting Song about his remarkably organised kernel rows.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 16
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo want to play restaurants with Grandad, but it's a little different than he's used to... he's going to need an app to order the food!

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 17
programme.desc: Mum won't let Bingo have Pavlova, so the kids find a way by playing a cheeky game of Café in the kitchen. But Dad the chef sets up a competing shop that only serves edamame beans.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S2) - EP 21
programme.desc: Duggee is cleaning his biscuit tin collection, one of the many things he collects. The squirrels are inspired to make their own collections.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S2) - EP 20
programme.desc: The squirrels have arrived and they're all a little bit hyped up with bundles of energy. Things are starting to get a bit frantic, and Duggee needs to calm them all down. Fortunately, he has his Yoga Badge.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1) - EP 12
programme.desc: Water, water, everywhere - there's a flood in our hospital soap opera! Grown-up Tag the firefighter splashes around. It's a good job grown-up Happy the lifeguard is on hand

programme.desc: It's a very rainy day at the Go Jet Academy and the Go Jetters are teaching the Cadets some crucial Go Jetter skills.

programme.title: Roots & Fruits (S1) - EP 10
programme.desc: Live from the Roots & Fruits theatre, it's Plum performing the Sugar Plum Fairy Bounce and attempting to do not one, not two, but three pirouettes in midair!

programme.title: Roots & Fruits (S1) - EP 9
programme.desc: Live from the Roots & Fruits theatre, it's Corn singing an A-maiz-ing Counting Song about his remarkably organised kernel rows.

programme.title: Supertato (S1) - EP 19
programme.desc: Supertato gets hiccups while Evil Pea is firing jam at Tato Tower. Supertato harnesses the power of his hiccups to save Tato Tower from Evil Pea's jam attack.

programme.title: Supertato (S1) - EP 20
programme.desc: A toy dinosaur rampages in the Supermarket and scares the Grape Kids. Carrot and Supertato work out that it's controlled by a remote control and get the dinosaur back in its box.

programme.title: Teletubbies (S1) - EP 62
programme.desc: When it's time for the Tubby Custard Ride, there's a special trailer the Teletubbies haven't seen before. It's for The Noo-Noo who gets to go on a special Tubby Custard Ride.

programme.title: Yakka Dee (S2) - EP 16
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say 'feet' and we go on a whirlwind word adventure! There are little feet, jumping feet and there's even a little duckling with some webbed feet.

programme.title: Messy goes to OKIDO (S3) - EP 12
programme.desc: Messy gets pins and needles and causes chaos at the OKIDO musical statues competition.

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops (S1) - EP 2
programme.desc: Mojo Swoptops and best buddy Bo love to help their friends in the little town of Swoppiton. With a swop of Mojo's top and Bo's brilliant plans, they make an unstoppable team!

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 20
programme.desc: With only five minutes to play 'Driving', Bluey and Mum race against the clock to buy milk for a grumpy guest and have to escape an angry shopkeeper.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 19
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo make mud pizzas and deliver them to the grown-ups, but their pedal car's wheel keeps falling off.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5) - EP 7
programme.desc: Roly reveals he's expecting a new baby brother or sister, and the Squirrels have questions.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5) - EP 6
programme.desc: Why do my feet hurt?', Tag asks Duggee. While Duggee has a think, he tells them 'why' is a great question, and the Squirrels are quick to follow up.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1) - EP 5
programme.desc: King Tiger and the Jelly wonder what Duggee has planned for today. Tag wants a snack, Enid has a musical cheese chase, and Norrie has a haircut.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1) - EP 6
programme.desc: At Squirrel Club, Duggee forgets how to woof, Duggly comes to visit, Roly celebrates Potato Time, and Billy teaches everyone the Bugatron dance!

programme.title: Go Jetters (S2) - EP 50
programme.desc: The team are at Horsetail Fall in the Yosemite Nation Park to watch the 300m high waterfall become Firefall. Can the team save snowy Princess Glorinda and Firefall at the Yosemite National park?

programme.title: Bluey (S1) - EP 18
programme.desc: Honey is stuck waiting for Dr Bingo's as the other injuries get seen before her. Receptionist Bluey tells her to be patient, some of these cases are a real pickle!

programme.title: Bluey (S2) - EP 21
programme.desc: When Mum and Dad describe a made-up world where they can relax without the girls, Bluey and Bingo decide to burst into their fantasy and chase them down. How will Mum and Dad escape?

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 32
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo hide under the house and spy on two mysterious tradies working in the backyard, wondering what they're up to.

programme.desc: Muffin is playing Grouchy Granny at a garage sale, making Dad push her on an old mobility scooter, but when a real Grouchy Granny wants to buy it, Muffin won't budge.

programme.desc: Andy sails to California in search of a fish called a sarcastic fringehead.

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants S2 - EP 44

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants S2 - EP 45
programme.desc: The crew meets their blue-hued doppelgängers when they crash-land on an alien planet where kids call all the shots.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers S1 - EP 1
programme.desc: 17-year-old Tony Toretto and his gang are psyched when Dom recommends them to Ms. Nowhere for a spy racing job. Excited to get the opportunity to live up to Dom’s legacy, they use their street smarts and driving skills to infiltrate a race with SH1FT3R, a high-octane racing circuit whose drivers are all under 20.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers S1 - EP 2
programme.desc: Tony goes head-to-head with SH1FT3R’s main recruiter Layla Gray in a death-defying spy race through LA Tunnels, parking lots and construction sites. Tony’s awesome driving impresses Shashi Dhar (the head of SH1FT3R and the person Ms. Nowhere wants them to investigate), and after Tony and his crew pull a heist on a big rig full of energy drinks for Shashi, they’re officially accepted into the circuit.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers S1 - EP 3
programme.desc: Tony races against Shashi and Layla through a Northern California ghost town, but Shashi and Layla are using the race as a cover for a heist on a billionaire’s train. Tony and his team are introduced to the other cool SH1FT3R racers, and while they can’t stop the heist without blowing their cover, they do manage to get a tracker on the train car Shashi and Layla stole.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers S1 - EP 4
programme.desc: Shashi sends Tony and Layla to steal weapons codes from a Russian oligarch, while Margaret "Echo" Pearl, Cisco and Frostee use Shashi’s absence to sneak into Shashi’s Cliffside mansion to investigate. Ms. Nowhere tells the team to look for the "keys" in Shashi’s mansion, but all they find are a couple of awesome super-cars.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers S1 - EP 5
programme.desc: Shashi stages a race up the privately-owned Mount Zebulon, and he invites Tony, Cisco, and Margaret "Echo" Pearl to participate. The crew soon discovers that Shashi is using the race to steal another super-car (this time from space!) - and he knows that Tony is working with the feds.

programme.title: Tinga Tinga Tales S1 - EP 31
programme.desc: You see there was a time when Leopard didn't have spots. All the animals had something special; Lion had his mane, Peacock his beautiful tail, Zebra his stripes… but Leopard was as plain as plain can be. Then one day Leopard made friends with Puff Adder with his bright colourful spots. Tales from Africa.

programme.title: Tinga Tinga Tales S1 - EP 32
programme.desc: You see there was a time when Hyena didn't have short back legs. He was always chasing around and nipping other animals on the bottom. Then one day the animals had enough. It was time to teach that naughty Hyena a lesson! Tales from Africa.

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants S2 - EP 33
programme.desc: The campers' splat-tastic game of paintball is rather rudely interrupted by a foul and formidable fiend known only as Camoflush.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers S1 - EP 25
programme.desc: After an epic chase around the globe, the team finally catches Rafaela, making it Ms. Nowhere's 100th arrest - and the agency is throwing her a party! Meanwhile, Cisco's uncle Tuco, a famous luchador in Mexico, is visiting town promoting his next show. But the celebration comes to a halt when there's an explosion at the party and an attack by a mysterious group of criminals!

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers S1 - EP 26
programme.desc: When the team is framed for the events of Ms. Nowhere's party, they're arrested and are on their way to separate government facilities. It's up to Frostee, with a help from Sissy, to track down the team and bust them out before they're locked up for good!

programme.title: Go, Dog. Go! S1 - EP 25
programme.desc: Based on PD Eastman's classic children’s book, Go, Dog. Go! Follows 6-year-old dog, Tag Barker, on her hilarious adventures in the city of Pawston, a fun-loving community of dogs on the go. Tag is a skilled mechanic and loves anything that goes. With her ingenuity and creativity, Tag can go as far as any plan will take her, always with her best friend, Scooch Pooch, by her side. Scooch’s easy-going nature is the perfect counterbalance to Tag’s high-octane energy.

programme.title: Go, Dog. Go! S1 - EP 26
programme.desc: When Tag and Scooch learn that Sandra Paws' sleigh broke down on a mountain, they have to go on an adventure to fix the sleigh and save Sniffs-mas! Meanwhile, Beans tries to get a grumpy Frank to feel the Sniffs-mas spirit.

programme.title: Dew Drops Diaries S1 - EP 25
programme.desc: Marcus makes a Dew Drop-sized hot-air balloon for Phoebe and the Dews have a blast helping their kids from above, including secretly guiding Lola back to her family, before she accidentally follows Hip-Hop the frog out of the park. / Phoebe makes a pair of glasses for Bob the bird, but when seeing things clearly for the first time gets him lost, the Dews help Bob find his nest before his family arrives for a visit.

programme.title: Dew Drops Diaries S1 - EP 26
programme.desc: The Dews think a double rainbow is making their powers change, but what they discover is that they are about to graduate to a new level of Dew Dropness, with the newfound ability to float in the air! / When Reed discovers he’s being assigned a family, he runs to tell Athena, only to find Athena and her house are missing! programme.title: Team Zenko Go S1 - EP 3

programme.title: Team Zenko Go S1 - EP 4

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S1 - EP 25
programme.desc: When Gabby unboxes a recipe for dandelion soup and a soup bowl, she discovers Kitty Fairy is sick! programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S1 - EP 1
programme.desc: The dollhouse delivery is a spaceship that takes off with a sleeping CatRat inside! Gabby, Pandy, and Kitty Fairy have to get the ship back into The Fairy Tail Garden before Floyd (who thinks it's the best kitty toy ever!) gets his paws on it!

programme.title: Dawn Of The Croods S2 - EP 51

programme.title: Dawn Of The Croods S2 - EP 52
programme.desc: With a big meteorite headed straight for Ahhh! Valley, Grug gathers a team to try and stop the rock before it destroys the valley while Ugga takes the rest of the family to go do the one thing they've always wanted to do in Ahhh! Valley before they evacuate

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in the Crib S3 - EP 59
programme.desc: Missing his old life on his birthday, Boss tries to have a full-fledged grown-up celebration in Chicago, but Carol is the only one able to chauffeur and take care of him. programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in the Crib S3 - EP 60
programme.desc: Boss, Tina, JJ, Dez and Pip willfully get babysat by the Uncuddleables, planning to expose them as horrible sitters via secret, hidden cameras. But the plan is thrown for a loop when Tina's first night alone without her parents makes her fall for their sitter Mia as a "substitute mommy." Meanwhile, Nannycam uses the babysitting distraction to sneak into the Uncuddleables' secret garage hideout to gather intel with her own "B field team."

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge S1 - EP 25

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants S1 - EP 25

But when George and Harold find out, they crank the nanobots to the max, causing Melvin to grow into a giant! programme.title: Foreign Correspondent (2026) - EP 3
programme.desc: A revolution is taking place in Indonesia. President Prabowo Subianto is nationalising and militarising his nation's economy to deliver a self-reliant future. But some warn Indonesia could be returning to the Suharto era.

programme.title: Planet America (2026) - EP 7
programme.desc: How and when will America's war with Iran end? We ask former US Navy Rear Admiral Mark Montgomery. Meanwhile on the home front, President Trump wants to save American democracy - by making it much harder to vote.

programme.title: The Pacific (2025) - EP 20
programme.desc: In a special episode of The Pacific, 'Crowning Glory' we dive into the region's enduring love of beauty pageants. Amid the glamour, we examine the tensions and debates shaping the future of pageantry in the Pacific.

programme.title: Movin' To The Country S1 - EP 4
programme.desc: The team heads to the Top End where local Territorians are creating pathways to employment for Indigenous youth. Halina investigates an astonishing bit of kit and Craig rides along with an innovative tour company.

programme.title: The World (2026) - EP 41
programme.desc: Girish Sawlani brings you the latest news from around the globe. Tonight: Donald Trump calls on NATO allies to secure the Strait of Hormuz, and Ukraine resists reopening a Russian oil pipeline to appease Hungary.

programme.title: News Breakfast (2026) - EP 54
programme.desc: As the day begins get the facts you need to stay informed. James Glenday and Emma Rebellato bring you the latest news, interviews and the day's top stories, joined by Catherine Murphy with sport and Nate Byrne with weather.

programme.title: News Breakfast (2026) - EP 54
programme.desc: As each day begins get the facts you need to stay informed. James Glenday and Emma Rebellato present the latest news, overnight developments and today's top stories, joined by Catherine Murphy, Nate Byrne and Lillian Rangiah.

programme.title: ABC News Mornings (2026) - EP 54
programme.desc: Stay in the know with what's happening this morning. ABC News brings you up-to-the-minute news to fuel your daily conversations so you can stay connected and follow the discussion across the day. Presented by Gemma Veness.

programme.title: ABC News At Noon (2026) - EP 54
programme.desc: The leading news at lunchtime. Ros Childs brings you the day's top stories and the latest news as it unfolds, with reporters in the community across Australia and around the world reporting on the issues that matter to you.

programme.title: Australian Story (2026) - EP 5
programme.desc: Who cares for our children when we're gone if they can't care for themselves? As Deirdre Croft faces the end of her life, she's on a mission to ensure her son is looked after when she's gone.

programme.title: Great Australian Walks S1 - EP 10
programme.desc: It's one of the world's most famous strips of sand, but along Bondi's coastal track lies some hidden gems that not even Julia Zemiro was aware of when she used to live here.

programme.title: Bee Cause S1 - EP 5
programme.desc: A group of Australian children has embraced the joys of keeping hives and harvesting honey, inspired by a hairdresser turned apiarist. It's the only club of its kind in Australia, and they are loving it.

programme.title: Extraordinary Animals S1 - EP 10
programme.desc: Many scientists believe curiousity is a key driving force in evolution - leading to both physical and behavioural adaptations. This episode features some surprisingly intelligent and uniquely curious animals.

programme.desc: Surf and turf is a great combination, but why not make it even better by serving it with tacos? Rachael shows us how to make the ultimate date-night combo of crab nachos and steak tacos.

programme.title: Legends Of The Fork - EP 3
programme.desc: Buddy heads to two restaurants with huge reputations. First up is DiFara Pizza in Brooklyn, New York to learn the secrets to their famous slice. Then it's off to visit Mini Kabob in Glendale, California.

programme.title: Global Soul Kitchen (S1) - EP 2
programme.desc: Chef Deborah combines the flavours of Morocco, Tunisia and Louisiana by making savoury cheddar cheese grits topped with "eggs in purgatory", a dish made with spicy tomato sauce, similar to shakshuka.

programme.title: Jason's Table: Masterful Dishes - EP 2
programme.desc: Join Jason Wang to explore the Pagoda of Once Cut Pork, a renowned Taiwanese dish where Chef Hong Ming skillfully carves pork belly into a delectable, melt-in-your-mouth "pagoda" with precision knife work.

programme.title: Cruise Ship Murder
programme.desc: When her aunt is found dead, having mysteriously fallen overboard from a cruise ship, Olivia is thrown into rough seas as her uncle's secret past is brought to light and more deaths occur.

programme.title: The Venice Murders
programme.desc: Leaving her career behind, Celia follows her passion to Italy but faces crisis when her roommate vanishes. Alone, she joins eccentric Aunt Rosato to rescue her friend and unmask the abductor.

programme.title: Legends Of The Fork - EP 3
programme.desc: Buddy heads to two restaurants with huge reputations. First up is DiFara Pizza in Brooklyn, New York to learn the secrets to their famous slice. Then it's off to visit Mini Kabob in Glendale, California.

programme.title: Global Soul Kitchen (S1) - EP 2
programme.desc: Chef Deborah combines the flavours of Morocco, Tunisia and Louisiana by making savoury cheddar cheese grits topped with "eggs in purgatory", a dish made with spicy tomato sauce, similar to shakshuka.

programme.title: Jason's Table: Masterful Dishes - EP 6
programme.desc: Five Willow Fish is a Taiwanese dish that makes great use of the nation's affluent fishery. Chef Long interprets this dish with masterful skills, and Jason creates a dish inspired by Five Willow Fish.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia (S17) - EP 47
programme.desc: Today, the contestants have another chance at grabbing immunity. In a lucky dip, they must pick a letter of the alphabet to reveal a corresponding ingredient they must cook with.

programme.title: Oceanfront Property Hunt (S1) - EP 1
programme.desc: Laura and Brandon have always wanted to live by the ocean and give their children the nautical life. After a major bathroom flood forces them to move, they decide it's time to make the leap.

programme.title: Ppang Car Road 2 - EP 2
programme.desc: From Seoul to Busan, this spectacular eating show takes place at famous bakeries/patisseries to give the dessert lovers the glimpse of tasty goodness of some of the most-coveted desserts of all.

programme.title: Jason's Table: Masterful Dishes - EP 7
programme.desc: Pantoh is a Taiwanese dining experience where guests enjoy exquisite dishes in open-air venues. Chef Ah-yong showcases an emblematic dish of pantoh cuisine: calamari, sea snail, and leek soup.

programme.title: The Venice Murders
programme.desc: Leaving her career behind, Celia follows her passion to Italy but faces crisis when her roommate vanishes. Alone, she joins eccentric Aunt Rosato to rescue her friend and unmask the abductor.

programme.title: Living with My Mother's Killer
programme.desc: Still reeling from the tragic murder of her mother years ago, Mara forgives the man who killed her and allows him to work on her property, only to find that what's past is not always past.

programme.title: MasterChef USA (S13) - EP 20
programme.desc: Judges Gordon Ramsay, Aarón Sanchez and Joe Bastianich crown the next MasterChef champion and the winner of $250,000.

programme.title: Million Dollar Zombie Flips - EP 1
programme.desc: Ambitious flipper Leka finds a promising zombie house but lacks the funds to make it happen. Expert flipper James Dainard is intrigued yet sceptical due to the house's poor kerb appeal and choppy layout.

programme.title: Ppang Car Road 2 - EP 3
programme.desc: From Seoul to Busan, this spectacular eating show takes place at famous bakeries/patisseries to give the dessert lovers the glimpse of tasty goodness of some of the most-coveted desserts of all.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia (S17) - EP 48
programme.desc: Itis a time split! The contestants have 90 minutes to use across two rounds. Those who end up in Round 2 will need to use their time more cleverly than ever before to stay in the competition.

programme.title: Legends Of The Fork - EP 4
programme.desc: Buddy heads to two restaurants that are known as much for their Hollywood connection, as they are for serving delicious food. The Victor Cafe in Philadelphia and El Coyote, a Hollywood stomping ground.

programme.title: Global Soul Kitchen (S1) - EP 3
programme.desc: Chef Deborah VanTrece makes Southern-style fried chicken Monte Cristo, served with a cranberry sauce. It's inspired by and similar to a croque monsieur, a delicious warm French ham and cheese sandwich.

programme.title: Theresa Caputo: Raising Spirits (S1) - EP 3
programme.desc: Always game to try new things, Theresa and Kiana attend a line-dancing class in Dallas. While there, Theresa conducts an impromptu group reading that leaves several cowboys in tears.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Meals In Minutes (S1) - EP 17
programme.desc: You only need one skillet to make this stellar sauteed chicken dinner, served with sauteed vegetables and flavoured with heavy cream, dijon mustard and imported beer.
